reviews.comment:
El día 24 de abril de 2023, tuve un inconveniente por lo que tuve que llamar al servicio de Auxilio, en la ciudad de Miramar. Deseo destacar el profesionalismo y la amable atención del señor  Juan Ignacio Porreta , que tuvo a su cargo el auxilio.

(Translated by Google)
On April 24, 2023, I had a problem and had to call the roadside assistance service in the city of Miramar. I would like to highlight the professionalism and kind attention of Mr. Juan Ignacio Porreta, who was in charge of the assistance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdUl6ZDh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, mucha demora en acceder al surtidor. Consulte a los playeros y me informan que se debe a qué hay pocas estaciones de servicio en la cuidad

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but a long wait at the pump. I asked the attendants and they told me it was because there are few gas stations in the city.
